title: The Sashastra Seema Bal Act, 2007
full_text: The Sashastra Seema Bal Act, 2007 सशस्त्रग सीमा बल अधिनियम, 2007 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200753 Act Number: 53 Enactment Date: 2007-12-20 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Sashastra Seema Bal Act, 2007 Hindi Title: सशस्त्रग सीमा बल अधिनियम, 2007 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution and regulation of an armed force of the Union for ensuring the security of the borders of India and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 01-08-2009 Notification: 1st August, 2009, vide notification No. S.O. 1871(E), dated 31st July, 2009, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Sec. 3(ii).
